content.prompt:
Read two lines of space-separated integers (two lists). Using sets, find and print:
1. Elements common to both lists (intersection), sorted
2. Elements in the first list but not the second (difference), sorted
3. All unique elements from both lists combined (union), sorted
Print each on a separate line, space-separated.
content.starterCode:
# TODO: Read two lists
list1 = list(map(int, input("Enter list 1: ").split()))
list2 = list(map(int, input("Enter list 2: ").split()))

# TODO: Convert to sets
# TODO: Find intersection, difference, union
# TODO: Print each sorted and space-separated
# Common: ...
# Only in first: ...
# All unique: ...

Only in first: 1 2
All unique: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
